title: dortmanna hirsuta
intro: Dortmanna hirsuta, also known as bearberry or uva-ursi, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Europe and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of arbutin. The health benefits of Dortmanna hirsuta include its ability to prevent and treat urinary tract infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat conditions such as kidney stones, cystitis, and diarrhea.
